microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF eating alone in a quiet personal setting AND neutral AND refrigerated savory meal THEN 2 min BECAUSE they like food served warm without overdoing heat. IF eating alone in a quiet personal setting AND in a hurry AND refrigerated savory meal THEN 1 min BECAUSE speed matters more than maximum warmth. IF eating alone in a quiet personal setting AND relaxed with ample time AND refrigerated savory meal THEN 3 min BECAUSE they enjoy hotter food when time pressure is low. IF any dining context AND neutral AND fruit or cold dessert THEN no microwave BECAUSE those foods are intended to stay cold. IF social setting with another person nearby AND neutral AND refrigerated savory meal THEN 2 min BECAUSE they prefer standard warmth without delaying interaction. IF watching television or working on a laptop/tablet AND fatigued AND refrigerated savory meal THEN 3 min BECAUSE fatigue increases desire for comforting hotter food. IF social setting with another person nearby AND in a hurry AND refrigerated savory meal THEN 1 min BECAUSE hurry outweighs the small benefit of extra heating.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF eating alone in a quiet personal setting AND neutral AND any food THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE there is no competing visual target. robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF eating alone in a quiet personal setting AND neutral AND any food THEN medium BECAUSE they like balanced efficiency and comfort. skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF eating alone in a quiet personal setting AND neutral AND firm foods like meat or fruit chunks THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE they prioritize reliable bite acquisition. IF watching television or working on a laptop/tablet AND in a hurry AND any skewerable food THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE success rate matters more than bite shape. IF social setting with another person nearby AND fatigued AND large bulky pieces THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE this user consistently breaks ties in favor of reliable acquisition in social contexts. IF any dining context AND neutral AND soft desserts like brownies THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it is the more generally dependable default.
